changelog: Tich hop buoc Tao viec + Nhap viec vao trong tab 'Nhap thu cong': AI sinh Title + Description (Background/Objective/Notes) + Acceptance Criteria; modal Chi tiet hien Description + AC; nut 'Nhap viec ngay' chay submitter luon khong can qua Tab 2/3. Submitter skip click 'Goi y bang AI' khi description da co san (tiet kiem ~45s/task).
